data_sources.state_gdp_per_capita: MoSPI State GDP estimates 2022-23, current prices
data_sources.state_informal_economy_share: NSSO Periodic Labour Force Survey (PLFS) 2022-23, share of informal employment in non-agricultural sector
data_sources.ruling_party_trust_index: Lokniti-CSDS post-election survey 2020, government satisfaction index for AAP
data_sources.political_contestation_index: Election Commission of India (ECI) 2024 general election data, effective number of parties and margin analysis
data_sources.language_network_multiplier: Hindi belt baseline = 1.0; Census 2011 language tables show 81% Hindi speakers in NCT Delhi
data_sources.media_penetration: BARC India TV Universe Estimates 2023 (tv), IRS 2022 (print), IAMAI-Kantar Internet Report 2023 (digital), RAM Ratings 2022 (radio)
data_sources.union_legal_framework: Delhi being a UT with limited state powers; Industrial Disputes Act applicability assessed as moderate
data_sources.examination_board: Both CBSE (headquartered in Delhi) and Delhi state board (DSEB) operate
